channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Amber Light not working, 30th April
item.description:
On pedestrian crossing, as you approach from the High Street, the Amber light on the traffic light on LHS of road isn't working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 30th April
item.description:
Abrupt level difference CW, around cover 1800x100x40mm approx Road closure Stats (CW6 Abrupt Level Differences )
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree damaging fence and blocking sunlight, 30th April
item.description:
On Ermin street, to the rear of 3 Ridgemount close back garden

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 30th April
item.description:
CW Pothole 800mm x 400mm x 58mm Give and Take TM Opposite number 34 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overhanging the road and paths, 30th April
item.description:
Along Symphony Road, numbers 42,46 and 44 and then towards Beni Close the trees are overhanging onto the path and road causing obstructions

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Symphony Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wire fencing dumped near 17 Kempton Grove, 30th April
item.description:
Wire fencing left on green posing a risk to wildlife and children.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Kempton Grove, Fiddler's Green, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previously repaired section of road full of potholes. Has been like this for far too long. Needs repairing., 30th April
item.description:
Ermin Street. A long section of previously repaired road full of potholes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gigantic wide potholes which you can not avoid driving over turning out of Meadowsweet Road. These need to be filled urgently., 30th April
item.description:
In the middle of the road on Leckhampton Lane as you turn into Meadowsweet Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 30th April
item.description:
ENWD 15MDB CWPH 1000 X 400 raised as perm repair MARKED AS X (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 30th April
item.description:
Fw overgrown hedge Needs cutting back hard 14 mtrs length 2 way lights Suspend x2 bus stops (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain sunk near lights, 30th April
item.description:
The drain has sunk again and rattles when driven over.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 30th April
item.description:
Cut branches to aid visibility at junction Job completed at time of visit by inspector Give and take TM Opposite number 2 (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet
